meta.title: {{name}} | Backend Developer
meta.description: Backend Developer building web products, APIs, and modernizing operational systems.

intro: I build backend and full-stack products across APIs, data, payments, video streaming, and the analysis and modernization of operational systems.

journey.title: How I build a product
journey.description: A complete process from understanding the problem to building, validating, and improving the product.

capabilities.title: From technical foundations to a complete product.
capabilities.description: Three areas I actively develop and have applied in real projects or personal products.

backend.title: Backend & data
backend.body: Design APIs, implement business logic, work with PostgreSQL, and organize code for testing, extension, and maintenance.

product.title: Product thinking
product.body: View features across the user journey, connecting frontend, backend, payments, and content instead of treating an API in isolation.

delivery.title: Delivery & validation
delivery.body: Validate outputs, handle webhooks and cloud flows, and compare behavior so products work correctly in real conditions.

story.title: Curious about the problem, deliberate about the details.
story.body: I enjoy understanding how a system truly works, turning requirements into clear flows, and improving a product step by step. Every project expands my perspective across backend, frontend, data, and user experience.

gallery.projectAlt: Personal photo while working on a project

closing.title: Ready for the next challenge.
closing.body: I am looking to join a team where I can deepen my backend skills, contribute to real products, and learn from experienced engineers.

featured.title: Featured projects
featured.description: A new full-stack product alongside system modernization work delivered in real project environments.

nextHint: Next: About me and career direction
